arts.ttl: Aston Villa prepare for huge night six years on from cabbage-gate
arts.sum: Aston Villa are preparing to face Bayern Munich in the Champions League this evening in the club’s first home fixture in this competition since the early eighties. Unai Emery’s transformation of the club has seen Villa rise from the lower regions of the Premier League to Europe’s biggest stage and the visit of Bayern Munich […] The post Aston Villa prepare for huge night six years on from cabbage-gate first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Kompany thrives under high expectations at Bayern
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany says he relishes the high expectations placed on him at Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala “not planning on move” to the Premier League amid interest
arts.sum: “I don’t try to think too far forward about where I want to be because situations can always change by the year or by the month. For Bayern Munich superstar Jamal Musiala, PL clubs are making a beeline for him since becoming an undisputed starter for the German giants.

arts.ttl: W*nk and you missed it: Bayern Munich’s Sven Ulreich forgiven by Bayer Leverkusen’s Simon Rolfes, but will the DFB drop its probe?
arts.sum: Speaking to DAZN (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayer Leverkusen sporting director Simon Rolfes said that Sven Ulreich contacted him, apologized, and that the matter is over in his eyes. Will the organization look to crackdown on future offenders by making an example of Ulreich?

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich: Harry Kane and Ollie Watkins rivalry ramps up in Champions League clash
arts.sum: Watkins has a huge platform to prove why he should supersede Kane as England’s starting striker

arts.ttl: Michael Olise to Join New Balance?
arts.sum: Michael Olise, the new Bayern Munich star, could soon announce a new boot supplier.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Bayern Munich: How do they stack up?
arts.sum: Much like Nagelsmann, Toppmöller has quickly crafted a reputation as one of the best young coaches in the game, and he seems to be only improving this season as he shows his prowess at making a team and partnerships click all over the pitch. The pair have started every competitive match so far this season - including when the Bayern boss switched to a hybrid three-man defence for the 2-0 win over Freiburg on Matchday 2 where Kimmich shifted between right-back and central midfield - and have conceded a league-low four goals so far this season (plus two in the 9-2 Champions League win over Dinamo Zagreb on Matchday 1).

arts.ttl: Watkins pre-Bayern: I want Kane's England spot
arts.sum: Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins hopes to put down an England marker when he faces Bayern Munich in the Champions League tonight with Harry Kane still hoping to be fit.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa to battle West Ham for attacker who will cost around €25-30 million
arts.sum: Aston Villa and West Ham United are keen on signing the Valencia striker Hugo Duro. According to a report from Fichajes, the two English clubs are keen on signing the 24-year-old centre forward and he is likely to cost around €25-30 million. Duro had an impressive season with Valencia last year and he scored 13 […] The post Aston Villa to battle West Ham for attacker who will cost around €25-30 million appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Can Eintracht Frankfurt's Omar Marmoush dethrone Bayern Munich's Harry Kane?
arts.sum: Harry Kane topped the scoring chart in a record-breaking debut Bundesliga campaign in 2023/24, but the Bayern Munich striker is facing some stiff early-season competition from Eintracht Frankfurt's Omar Marmoush. After swapping long-time home Tottenham Hotspur for Bayern last summer, the Bavarian giants' record signing hit the ground running and smashed home a league- and European-high 36 goals - including the Bundesliga's Goal of the Season!
